processSection.headline: How It Works
processSection.description: Getting the right HVAC solution is straightforward.

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Call us or submit a request online. Describe your space and comfort goals, and we'll guide you to the right solution.

steps.title: Get Your Free Estimate
steps.description: We assess your space, recommend the best equipment, and provide a clear, upfront quote with no hidden costs.

steps.title: Professional Installation
steps.description: Our technicians deliver and install your unit quickly and correctly. Most jobs are completed the same day.

testimonialsSection.headline: What Our Customers Say

aboutSection.description: NewYork HVAC Solutions has served property owners across New York City since 2016. What started as a focused PTAC and HVAC supply operation has grown into a full-service provider handling everything from unit selection and delivery to professional installation and repair. We work with residential tenants, building managers, and commercial property owners throughout the five boroughs. Every job comes with transparent pricing, a one-year warranty, and the responsive service that's earned us a 4.6-star reputation.
aboutSection.mission: To make HVAC simple, affordable, and reliable for every New York property owner.

values.title: Transparent Pricing
values.description: You see the full cost before any work begins. No hidden fees, no surprise charges on delivery day.

values.title: Expert Guidance
values.description: Our team helps you find the right unit for your space, budget, and building requirements every time.

values.title: Fast Delivery
values.description: We keep popular PTAC units and parts in stock for quick turnaround when you need them most.
